ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the security was traded */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the trading interval */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading interval */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of securities traded */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security symbol */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security for the given interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security for the given interval */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the security for the given interval */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trading data */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data is real-time or historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES securities ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time when the security details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user during the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated security */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "trigger_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification sent for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES securities ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time when the report was updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time when the strategy was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the indicator was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time when the indicator was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtesting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtesting result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy being tested */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the backtesting */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtesting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtesting period */,
  "backtest_status" TEXT /* Status of the backtest */,
  "backtest_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the backtest in seconds */,
  "strategy_performance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the performance of the strategy during the backtest */,
  "backtest_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the backtest was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Method used to send the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
